---
title: "Day 4 — Knowledge Transfer Tools"
subtitle: "Thursday 18 June 2026"
---

*Shifting from analysis to dissemination: groups develop vignettes with worked code examples and draft the "Ten Simple Rules for SA–IDM Integration".*

## Schedule

| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 9:00–10:00 | Introduce "Ten Simple Rules" concept · Brainstorm rules · Form writing and coding teams |
| 10:00–10:30 | Morning break |
| 10:30–12:00 | Begin vignette development in mixed groups · Document code examples · Draft Ten Simple Rules |
| 12:00–12:30 | **Keynote:** SA perspective — the case study illustrating challenges and areas for collaboration |
| 12:30–14:00 | Lunch |
| 14:00–15:30 | Continue vignette development |
| 15:30–16:00 | Afternoon break |
| 16:00–17:00 | **Plenary:** Review and discuss draft Ten Simple Rules |

---

## Materials

### Keynote Slides

*To be posted after the workshop*

### Draft Vignettes

*Links will appear here as groups share their drafts*

### Ten Simple Rules — Working Document

*Working draft will be linked here*
